response.overview: A video that compiles footage of human interaction with artificial agents, curiously watching the evolvement in human-to-agents interaction. Constant digital accompaniment was impossible until mobile devices became increasingly powerful. Text messages and synthesized voices become more than tools of communication, until attachment, dependence, and vulnerability no longer negotiated between humans, yet increasingly shaped, prompted, and sustained through artificial interlocutors.
response.title: åi(ʌɪ)
